title: Few Scary Mods
description: Not many horror mods are added to keep the vanilla-feel. But the mods can still get very intense. A scary atmosphere is also created by the installed shader.
body:
Being **stalked**, being **followed** and being **chased**. _All in this modpack._

To start, the [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) mod is installed for performance and reduced lag. To create some scariness the shader called [Cursed Fog](https://modrinth.com/shader/cursed-fog) is added. For the shader to work, [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) is added. For the horror mods, 2 were installed. The mod named [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog) and a mod called [The Man From The Fog - Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-man-from-the-fog-fabric) are installed. The mods [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) are forced to be in this modpack, otherwise the other mods won't work.
